name: Cloth travel bag
description:
Herbag Zip Retourne Cabine – Toile Criss Viking / Vache Hunter, Ecru-Noir & Noir (H077785CK AD)

The Herbag Zip Retourne Cabine in Toile Criss Viking is the more graphic iteration of the travel Herbag — the small-scale black and white check canvas is a house signature that reads as quietly distinctive rather than logo-forward, and pairs cleanly with the Noir Vache Hunter leather trim.

At the Cabine scale, this is a serious travel piece: large enough to function as a carry-on, structured enough to hold its shape, and light enough in construction that it doesn't add meaningful weight to your load.

This example was purchased at the Hermès boutique at 42 Avenue George V, Paris on June 11, 2022. Light travel use only, stored in its dustbag, with no visible wear to the Vache Hunter leather trim.

Features:
Laptop compartment
Phone and key pocket
Removable interior zip pouch
Exterior rear zip pocket
Collapsible top handle
Adjustable shoulder strap — carry by hand or over the shoulder

Condition:
Light travel use. Clean leather trim, no visible wear. Stored in dustbag.

Accompanied By:
Hermès  dustbag, lock, keys, clochette, removable interior pouch, and original Paris receipt. All accessories in excellent condition.
